spec_description: Evolutionary tournament: a population of strategy agents plays round-robin Prisoner's Dilemma matches. Successful strategies reproduce; unsuccessful ones are replaced. The base PD game is defined in gds-games (OGS), the specification in gds-framework, and the execution in gds-sim.
canonical_formula: h_θ : X → X  (h = f_θ ∘ g_θ, θ ∈ Θ)

tournament_architecture.title: Tournament Architecture (by Role)
tournament_architecture.description: GDS block roles: boundary inputs, policies, mechanisms, and state entities.
tournament_architecture.mermaid:
%%{init:{"theme":"neutral"}}%% flowchart TD classDef boundary fill:#93c5fd,stroke:#2563eb,stroke-width:2px,color:#1e3a5f classDef policy fill:#fcd34d,stroke:#d97706,stroke-width:2px,color:#78350f classDef mechanism fill:#86efac,stroke:#16a34a,stroke-width:2px,color:#14532d classDef control fill:#d8b4fe,stroke:#9333ea,stroke-width:2px,color:#3b0764 classDef generic fill:#cbd5e1,stroke:#64748b,stroke-width:1px,color:#1e293b classDef entity fill:#e2e8f0,stroke:#475569,stroke-width:2px,color:#0f172a classDef param fill:#fdba74,stroke:#ea580c,stroke-width:2px,color:#7c2d12 classDef state fill:#5eead4,stroke:#0d9488,stroke-width:2px,color:#134e4a classDef target fill:#fca5a5,stroke:#dc2626,stroke-width:2px,color:#7f1d1d classDef empty fill:#e2e8f0,stroke:#94a3b8,stroke-width:1px,color:#475569 subgraph boundary ["Boundary (U)"] Seed_Population([Seed Population]):::boundary Payoff_Matrix([Payoff Matrix]):::boundary end subgraph policy ["Policy (g)"] Round_Robin_Tournament[Round-Robin Tournament]:::policy Evolutionary_Selection[Evolutionary Selection]:::policy end subgraph mechanism ["Mechanism (f)"] Update_Scores[[Update Scores]]:::mechanism Update_Agents[[Update Agents]]:::mechanism Advance_Generation[[Advance Generation]]:::mechanism end entity_Population[("Population
agents: A, scores: S")]:::entity entity_Clock[("Clock
generation: t")]:::entity Update_Agents -.-> entity_Population Update_Scores -.-> entity_Population Advance_Generation -.-> entity_Clock Seed_Population --> Round_Robin_Tournament Payoff_Matrix --> Round_Robin_Tournament Round_Robin_Tournament --> Evolutionary_Selection Round_Robin_Tournament --> Update_Scores Evolutionary_Selection --> Advance_Generation Evolutionary_Selection --> Update_Agents style boundary fill:#dbeafe,stroke:#60a5fa,stroke-width:1px,color:#1e40af style policy fill:#fef3c7,stroke:#fbbf24,stroke-width:1px,color:#92400e style mechanism fill:#dcfce7,stroke:#4ade80,stroke-width:1px,color:#166534

tournament_by_domain.title: Tournament Architecture (by Domain)
tournament_by_domain.description: Blocks grouped by domain: Configuration, Game (OGS), Evolution, State.
tournament_by_domain.mermaid:
%%{init:{"theme":"neutral"}}%% flowchart TD classDef boundary fill:#93c5fd,stroke:#2563eb,stroke-width:2px,color:#1e3a5f classDef policy fill:#fcd34d,stroke:#d97706,stroke-width:2px,color:#78350f classDef mechanism fill:#86efac,stroke:#16a34a,stroke-width:2px,color:#14532d classDef control fill:#d8b4fe,stroke:#9333ea,stroke-width:2px,color:#3b0764 classDef generic fill:#cbd5e1,stroke:#64748b,stroke-width:1px,color:#1e293b classDef entity fill:#e2e8f0,stroke:#475569,stroke-width:2px,color:#0f172a classDef param fill:#fdba74,stroke:#ea580c,stroke-width:2px,color:#7c2d12 classDef state fill:#5eead4,stroke:#0d9488,stroke-width:2px,color:#134e4a classDef target fill:#fca5a5,stroke:#dc2626,stroke-width:2px,color:#7f1d1d classDef empty fill:#e2e8f0,stroke:#94a3b8,stroke-width:1px,color:#475569 subgraph Configuration ["Configuration"] Seed_Population([Seed Population]):::boundary end subgraph Game_OGS ["Game (OGS)"] Payoff_Matrix([Payoff Matrix]):::boundary Round_Robin_Tournament[Round-Robin Tournament]:::policy end subgraph Evolution ["Evolution"] Evolutionary_Selection[Evolutionary Selection]:::policy end subgraph State ["State"] Update_Scores[[Update Scores]]:::mechanism Update_Agents[[Update Agents]]:::mechanism Advance_Generation[[Advance Generation]]:::mechanism end entity_Population[("Population
agents: A, scores: S")]:::entity entity_Clock[("Clock
generation: t")]:::entity Update_Agents -.-> entity_Population Update_Scores -.-> entity_Population Advance_Generation -.-> entity_Clock Seed_Population --> Round_Robin_Tournament Payoff_Matrix --> Round_Robin_Tournament Round_Robin_Tournament --> Evolutionary_Selection Round_Robin_Tournament --> Update_Scores Evolutionary_Selection --> Advance_Generation Evolutionary_Selection --> Update_Agents

tournament_canonical.title: Canonical Decomposition
tournament_canonical.description: Formal GDS decomposition: h_θ : X → X  (h = f_θ ∘ g_θ, θ ∈ Θ)
tournament_canonical.mermaid:
%%{init:{"theme":"neutral"}}%% flowchart LR classDef boundary fill:#93c5fd,stroke:#2563eb,stroke-width:2px,color:#1e3a5f classDef policy fill:#fcd34d,stroke:#d97706,stroke-width:2px,color:#78350f classDef mechanism fill:#86efac,stroke:#16a34a,stroke-width:2px,color:#14532d classDef control fill:#d8b4fe,stroke:#9333ea,stroke-width:2px,color:#3b0764 classDef generic fill:#cbd5e1,stroke:#64748b,stroke-width:1px,color:#1e293b classDef entity fill:#e2e8f0,stroke:#475569,stroke-width:2px,color:#0f172a classDef param fill:#fdba74,stroke:#ea580c,stroke-width:2px,color:#7c2d12 classDef state fill:#5eead4,stroke:#0d9488,stroke-width:2px,color:#134e4a classDef target fill:#fca5a5,stroke:#dc2626,stroke-width:2px,color:#7f1d1d classDef empty fill:#e2e8f0,stroke:#94a3b8,stroke-width:1px,color:#475569 X_t(["X_t
agents, scores, generation"]):::state X_next(["X_{t+1}
agents, scores, generation"]):::state Theta{{"Θ
noise, rounds_per_match"}}:::param subgraph U ["Boundary (U)"] Seed_Population[Seed Population]:::boundary Payoff_Matrix[Payoff Matrix]:::boundary end subgraph g ["Policy (g)"] Round_Robin_Tournament[Round-Robin Tournament]:::policy Evolutionary_Selection[Evolutionary Selection]:::policy end subgraph f ["Mechanism (f)"] Update_Scores[Update Scores]:::mechanism Update_Agents[Update Agents]:::mechanism Advance_Generation[Advance Generation]:::mechanism end X_t --> U U --> g g --> f Update_Scores -.-> |Population.scores| X_next Update_Agents -.-> |Population.agents| X_next Advance_Generation -.-> |Clock.generation| X_next Theta -.-> g Theta -.-> f style U fill:#dbeafe,stroke:#60a5fa,stroke-width:1px,color:#1e40af style g fill:#fef3c7,stroke:#fbbf24,stroke-width:1px,color:#92400e style f fill:#dcfce7,stroke:#4ade80,stroke-width:1px,color:#166534
